title: Cover
description: Title slide — NexFlow pre-seed investor deck.

title: Problem
description: GCC sales teams run on WhatsApp and spreadsheets — imported CRMs are not built for the region.

title: Opportunity
description: GCC CRM TAM/SAM/SOM, with KSA Vision 2030 tailwind.

title: Product
description: Bilingual, AI-native, WhatsApp-first, sovereign CRM — four-pillar overview.

title: Why Now
description: Sovereignty mandate, AI inflection, and Vision 2030 budget redirect.

title: Business Model
description: Per-seat SaaS pricing — Starter, Growth, Sovereign — with Y1–Y3 ARPU progression.

title: Go-to-Market
description: Land in real-estate and clinics; expand to logistics and pro services; scale to enterprise & government.

title: Traction & Roadmap
description: MVP shipped, design partners signed, milestones to first paying seats and Y1 exit.

title: Competition & Moat
description: Why Salesforce, HubSpot, and Zoho cannot be retrofitted for KSA.

title: Financials
description: Three-year financial plan reconciled to the model — seats, ARPU, ARR, GM, EBITDA, NI.

title: Team
description: Founding team, engineering depth, and Vision 2030 advisory bench.

title: The Ask
description: $100K SAFE on $1.5M pre-money; runway, use of funds, and dilution.

title: Returns & Exit
description: Three exit scenarios with Y3 ARR-multiple math and SAFE MOIC.

title: Vision
description: From CRM wedge to sovereign Revenue OS for the GCC.

title: Closing
description: Closing slide — contact, materials, and round status.
